title: One-to-One Relationships Quiz
description: Test your understanding of One-to-One database relationships.

questions.question: Which of these is a perfect example of a One-to-One (1:1) relationship?
options: A Store and its many Customers
A Person and their single Social Security Number
A Teacher and their many Students
A Library and its thousands of Books

questions.question: How is a One-to-One relationship typically enforced in a SQL database table?
options: Using a foreign key with a UNIQUE constraint
Using a primary key on every column

questions.question: In Sequelize, which association methods are used to set up a One-to-One relationship?
What is one common reason to use a One-to-One relationship instead of a single table?
options: To slow down the database for security
To separate sensitive or optional metadata from the main record
Because JOINs are always faster than single table scans
